# Code of Conduct

## Our pledge

We are committed to making participation in NeverHuman a harassment-free experience for everyone, regardless of age, body size, visible or invisible disability, ethnicity, sex characteristics, gender identity and expression, level of experience, education, socioeconomic status, nationality, personal appearance, race, religion, or sexual identity and orientation.

## Our standards

**Positive behavior includes:**
- Using welcoming and inclusive language
- Respecting differing viewpoints and experiences
- Accepting constructive criticism gracefully
- Focusing on what is best for the community
- Showing empathy toward other community members

**Unacceptable behavior includes:**
- Trolling, insulting or derogatory comments, personal attacks
- Public or private harassment
- Publishing private information without permission
- Sexual attention or advances of any kind
- Other conduct that would be considered unprofessional

## Enforcement

Instances of abusive, harassing, or otherwise unacceptable behavior may be reported by opening a GitHub issue marked `[conduct]` or contacting the maintainers directly.

All complaints will be reviewed and investigated promptly and fairly. Maintainers are obligated to maintain confidentiality with regard to the reporter.

## Attribution

This Code of Conduct is adapted from the [Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org), version 2.1.
